title: MT loop-control checkpoint contract (bounded retries + verifier feedback)
goal: Implement the bounded mailbox-loop-control checkpoint contract that lets Role Mailbox coordinate Micro-Task retries, verifier feedback, verification-needed waits, escalation, and completion reports through structured checkpoints instead of transcript replay. Folds WP-1-Role-Mailbox-Micro-Task-Loop-Control-v1 stub intent: small local models, cloud models, reviewers, and operators can resume or inspect MT loops from compact state.
expected_diff_shape: New Rust module src/backend/handshake_core/src/process_ledger/mt_loop_control.rs with `MtLoopCheckpoint`, `MtLoopState`, `MtLoopControlBudget` types + `MtLoopControl` orchestration helper; integration tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/mt_loop_control_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-179 micro_task_* message families provide the typed feedback payloads; MT-184 MicroTaskJob provides the state container.
implementation_notes: Per spec line 6147 + folded stub WP-1-Role-Mailbox-Micro-Task-Loop-Control-v1 intent (refinement.json line 987): 'durable loop-control contract so small local models, cloud models, reviewers, and operators can resume or inspect Micro-Task loops from compact state rather than chat chronology.' Define `MtLoopCheckpoint { checkpoint_id: Uuid v7, job_id: Uuid v7 (FK MicroTaskJob), iteration_n: u32, state_at_checkpoint: MtLoopState, retry_budget_remaining: u32, verifier_feedback_history: Vec<VerifierFeedbackRef>, compact_summary: String (<= 2048 bytes — what next executor needs to continue), evidence_pointers: Vec<EvidencePointer>, created_at_utc, created_by_session: Uuid v7 }`. `MtLoopState` enum: `WaitingForVerifier`, `IteratingOnFeedback { feedback_id }`, `VerificationNeeded { reason }`, `EscalationProposed { target_tier }`, `Completed { signal: CompletionSignal }`. `MtLoopControlBudget { max_iterations: u32, max_consecutive_failures: u32, max_hardgate_pause_secs: u32, max_verifier_feedback_loops: u32 }` loaded from MT contract or default. `MtLoopControl::record_checkpoint(job, state, summary, evidence) -> MtLoopCheckpoint` writes to Postgres with FK to MicroTaskJob, enforces budget (returns LoopBudgetExceeded if violated). `MtLoopControl::resume_from(checkpoint_id) -> ResumeContext` produces the compact context a fresh executor needs (no transcript replay required). Spec line 6147 invariant enforced: must NOT authorize open-ended 'keep trying' loops; budget exhaustion returns LoopBudgetExceeded which forces escalation (handed to MT-188). Tests: (a) record sequential checkpoints, resume from last — get exact compact context; (b) exceed max_iterations, expect LoopBudgetExceeded; (c) resume across executor handoff (session_id change), checkpoint chain queryable; (d) verifier_feedback_history append-only (no rewrites).
risk_if_missed: Without compact checkpoints, MT loops require transcript replay to resume — silently violating the folded stub's 'compact state rather than chat chronology' invariant. Open-ended 'keep trying' loops become possible because the bounded-retry contract has no enforcement point.
validator_focus: Budget enforcement returns typed error (not silent continuation); compact_summary size bounded (CHECK constraint or runtime assertion); resume_from produces same context regardless of which executor calls it (determinism).

note: Queue primitive and schema tests passed.

postgres_test_url_live_evidence_20260525.summary: MT executor/job/loop/cancel/scheduler/outcome/orchestrator live Postgres checks passed for the continuation slice.

Focused Postgres/live-kernel commands were run, not a full workspace cargo test.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Budget exhaustion test asserts LoopBudgetExceeded forces escalation (no silent continuation).
Compact summary CHECK constraint enforces <= 2048 bytes at the database level.
Resume determinism proven by cross-executor test: two different session_ids resuming from same checkpoint produce byte-identical ResumeContext.

focused_default.note: 12 always-on pure-Rust tests pass; 7 Postgres-gated tests registered as #[ignore] until POSTGRES_TEST_URL is set. Cold compile finished in 8m 46s (library + test binary link); test execution wall time <1ms.

supporting_edits: src/backend/handshake_core/src/mt_executor/loop_control.rs (replaced inline skeleton with re-export of canonical process_ledger::mt_loop_control surface; preserves source compatibility for mt_executor::executor (MT-189) without forking the contract authority)

red_team_minimum_controls_evidence.control_1_budget_exhaustion_forces_escal: mt_185_bounded_retries_typed_error_at_ceiling asserts LoopBudgetExceeded at iteration=max_iterations and iteration=max_iterations+1; mt_185_budget_exhausted_matches_record_ceiling cross-checks the budget_exhausted predicate flips at the same boundary.
red_team_minimum_controls_evidence.control_2_compact_summary_check_db_level: mt_185_pg_check_constraint_rejects_oversized_summary_via_raw_sql attempts an INSERT bypassing the in-Rust gate; the CHECK constraint compact_summary_bound in migrations/0023_micro_task_job_queue.sql rejects oversized summaries at the database. Companion mt_185_compact_summary_size_bound_in_rust enforces the same bound at record time, including exactly-at-limit success.
red_team_minimum_controls_evidence.control_3_cross_executor_resume_determin: mt_185_resume_byte_identical_across_session_ids (pure-Rust) and mt_185_pg_cross_executor_resume_byte_identical (Postgres-gated) prove ResumeContext is byte-identical when two distinct session_ids read the same checkpoint.

postgres_test_url_checkpoint_precision_2.summary: Live POSTGRES_TEST_URL pass implemented/fixed the residual Postgres paths: MT-189 durable executor smoke, Locus GetMtProgress parity on Postgres, atomic scheduler claim to prevent duplicate SKIP LOCKED claims, checkpoint timestamp precision normalization, and raw_sql schema application for multi-statement Postgres migrations.
product_changes: src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/postgres.rs implements LocusOperation::GetMtProgress with the same structured progress metadata projection as SQLite.
src/backend/handshake_core/src/mt_executor/scheduler.rs now claims with one atomic UPDATE ... FROM candidate ... RETURNING job_id statement guarded by FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED and state=queued.
src/backend/handshake_core/src/process_ledger/mt_loop_control.rs normalizes checkpoint created_at_utc to Postgres microsecond precision at creation time.
src/backend/handshake_core/src/role_mailbox_v1/repo.rs and src/backend/handshake_core/src/mt_executor/scheduler.rs use sqlx::raw_sql for multi-statement schema setup.
src/backend/handshake_core/tests/observability_span_repo_tests.rs uses sqlx::raw_sql for multi-statement migration setup.
verification_caveats: A broad cargo test command filtered by process_ledger::mt_loop_control::tests but not scoped with --lib attempted to compile unrelated integration tests and failed on Windows paging-file exhaustion; the corrected --lib command passed.
Pre-existing warnings remain in unrelated code paths and were not addressed in this session.
Several modified backend files are untracked in this worktree; tracked-file git diff --check was clean for the tracked subset.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: MtLoopCheckpoint + MtLoopState + MtLoopControlBudget + MtLoopControl::record_checkpoint/resume_from primitives landed at src/process_ledger/mt_loop_control.rs (correct contract path). LoopBudgetExceeded typed error at ceiling (matches RGF-100 escalate-after-3-fix-cycles via max_consecutive_failures=3 default). DB-level CHECK on compact_summary <= 2048 bytes (postgres-gated test bypasses Rust to verify). Cross-executor resume byte-identical determinism proven. 12 always-on + 7 Postgres-gated green; live Postgres timestamp-precision normalization regression added 2026-05-25.
